description: Cross-platform mobile app (React Native / Flutter) with API integration

typical_tasks.description: Design screen map and navigation — list all screens, define navigation flow (stack/tab/drawer), identify shared components. Output: screen-map.md.
Design state management architecture — global state shape, local state decisions, API data caching strategy. Output: state-design.md.
Build core UI components — design system (colors, typography, spacing), reusable components (Button, Card, Input, Avatar). Must match the screen map from T1.
Implement API integration layer — typed API client, auth token storage (secure keychain), error handling, offline detection.
Build all screens using components from T3, wired to API client from T4. Implement navigation from T1 screen map.
Configure builds — iOS and Android build configs, app icons, splash screen, environment variables for dev/staging/prod.

stack_defaults.api_client: fetch with typed wrapper or Axios
